title: centaurea sphaerocephala var. polyacantha
intro: Centaurea sphaerocephala var. polyacantha, also known as Globe Cockscomb, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its spherical purple flowers and prickly stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Globe Cockscomb include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Globe Cockscomb is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used as a poultice or salve to apply topically for skin issues.
